title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: cockpit-composer bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for cockpit-composer is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: Composer generates custom images suitable for deploying systems or uploading to the cloud. It integrates into Cockpit as a frontend for osbuild.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Cockpit-composer UI on rhel 9 refreshes intermittently, interrupting any user action (JIRA:RHEL-118724)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems - Extended Update Support
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems - 4 years of updates
Red Hat Enterprise Linux Server for Power LE - Update Services for SAP Solutions
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64 - 4 years of updates
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux Server - AUS
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian - Extended Update Support
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 - Extended Update Support 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 - Update Services for SAP Solutions 10 x86_64

fixes.description: Cockpit-composer UI on rhel 9 refreshes intermittently, interrupting any user action

full_text:
An update for cockpit-composer is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Composer generates custom images suitable for deploying systems or uploading to the cloud. It integrates into Cockpit as a frontend for osbuild.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Cockpit-composer UI on rhel 9 refreshes intermittently, interrupting any user action (JIRA:RHEL-118724)
